name_en: 《Export Product》Milk White! Large OHANEL 25B Affinity Duma Backpack. The hottest one is definitely Duma, super high popularity 🆙, finally a classic return in the 25B series 🌟🌟. The zipper pull tab and leather drawstring feature classic quilted elements. The material is still calfskin, black and gold colorway is versatile and premium √. The leather is glossy and shiny 👅👅, and it's wear-resistant, so you don't need to worry too much about using it. The bag shape is compact and sharp! Casual and stylish when worn, practical and cute! The capacity is completely sufficient for commuting or travel. Dimensions: 25x22.5x15cm
